meta.title: Hacey Jeong, REALTOR® — Notes from Vancouver Island
meta.description: Hacey Jeong, REALTOR® with Royal LePage Nanaimo Realty. Bilingual EN/KO. Helping buyers and sellers across Nanaimo, Parksville, Qualicum Beach, Ladysmith, Duncan, and Victoria.

editorNote.body: I came to Vancouver Island after thirty countries and three careers — chemical engineering, the global oil & gas industry, then ownership of my own businesses. I chose this place because it asked the right things of me. Now I help others arrive here, settle here, and decide when it's time to move on. The work is part analysis, part patience, and entirely personal.

presale.title: First-time buyers
presale.body: Inspections, financing, strata documents, closing — at your pace, in plain language.

resale.title: Resale homes
resale.body: Condos, townhomes, and detached listings across the whole island.

investment.title: Investment property
investment.body: Rental yield, cycle positioning, and exit planning — practical, not promotional.

firstHome.title: Luxury & relocation
firstHome.body: Whether it's a luxury home or a full move-from-overseas, I handle it the same way: with quiet attention to every detail.

commercial.title: Commercial properties & business sales
commercial.body: Retail, restaurants, cafés, and business asset sales.

territory.title: Where I work — and what I notice.
territory.body: Primary coverage runs the central and south Island, with a closer eye on relocation-active corridors: Nanaimo, Parksville, Qualicum Beach, and Victoria.

items.body: Hacey, heartfelt thank you for supporting me as I felt my way through what's going to fit best for me and my kids. I appreciate your kindness, willingness to adjust to the spectrum of properties viewed, and always prompt responses. We shared some great laughs along the way too! You're a pleasure to work with and I'd recommend your expertise!

I was buying my first house, and obviously scared. Hacey met me with kindness, a bubbly personality and made my whole experience feel personal and human. She shared her opinions on the different locations and buildings — what she thought would best suit me. When she gave me my keys, she got me a Christmas basket, and was genuinely happy for me. Thank you so much Hacey!

We just bought our first house with Hacey and we couldn't be more thrilled. She walked us through the process step by step, answered every question quickly, and always stayed on top of everything. She always had our best interest in mind. She's a wonderful realtor and I highly recommend her to anyone buying or selling a home.

pullQuote.text: I don't just assist — I guide you through every stage with clarity and care.

subscribe.title: Looking at a specific listing or thinking about a move?
subscribe.body: Send me what you've found. I'll read it carefully and write back.

about.title: Hacey Jeong
about.subtitle: REALTOR® · Royal LePage Nanaimo Realty
about.bio: Bilingual REALTOR® serving Vancouver Island. Background in chemical engineering, global oil & gas, and small-business ownership.
about.essayParagraph1: Having travelled to over thirty countries and lived through the full relocation journey myself, I chose Vancouver Island as my home with clarity and intention. Originally from South Korea and a graduate of Korea University in Chemical Engineering, my career has taken me from the global oil & gas industry into entrepreneurship, and now to real estate. Each chapter taught me how to read complex situations, ask the right questions, and stay calm when the stakes are high.
about.essayParagraph2: Because I personally navigated immigration, housing, settlement, career transitions, and cultural adjustment, I understand what clients truly care about — finding the right community, making confident buying and selling decisions, and managing both the emotional and practical sides of a move. With a background in engineering, corporate strategy, and business ownership, I bring a blend of analytical thinking, organization, data-driven strategy, marketing, and calm problem-solving to every transaction.

aboutPullQuote.text: I don't just assist — I guide you through every stage with clarity and care.

aboutBridge.body: Have a question I should add to the playbook?

presalesPage.title: Buying and selling on the Island.
presalesPage.subtitle: A working notebook for Vancouver Island buyers, sellers, and movers.
presalesPage.intro: Vancouver Island runs on its own rhythm. Inventory is tighter than the mainland, the buyer pool changes by season, and the same neighbourhood can feel very different depending on whether you're commuting to the harbour, raising kids near a beach, or retiring near a vineyard. Below is the working set of questions I walk every client through — first-time buyer, relocation, or seller.

items.title: Why this place, why now
items.body: What's the actual reason for the move? Lifestyle, family, work, retirement — each leads to a different shortlist.

items.title: Community fit
items.body: Walkability, schools, neighbours, the drive to the ferry. What does a normal Tuesday look like here?

items.title: Inspection & condition
items.body: Island homes range from brand-new builds to heritage cottages. The inspection scope changes accordingly.

items.title: Financing & timing
items.body: Pre-approval is a date stamp, not a guarantee. Rate moves, bridge timing, and overseas funds add complexity.

items.title: Tax exposure
items.body: GST on new builds, Property Transfer Tax, foreign buyer rules, speculation tax. None appear on the price tag.

items.title: Strata & bylaws
items.body: If it's a condo or townhome — bylaws, depreciation reports, age-restriction clauses, rental rules. All in the documents.

items.title: Selling timing
items.body: If you're selling first, when do you list, when do you close, and where do you live in between?

items.title: After the keys
items.body: Utilities, insurance, settlement basics, where to find a doctor. The work doesn't end at completion.

presalesMethod.title: On method
presalesMethod.body: I don't push, I read carefully and write back honestly. If a property isn't right for you, I'll say so — even if that means waiting a few months for the right one. The brokerage compensation comes from the transaction; the trust comes from being straight with you. That's the only way the work compounds.

presalesCta.text: Looking at a specific listing or thinking about a move? Let's review it together.

contactPage.title: Let me help you settle in.
contactPage.subtitle: Most replies within a few hours. For anything urgent, call or text directly. 한국어로 편하게 연락하셔도 됩니다.
